title: QDC BiomePortal
description:
Portal used to teleport to nearby biomes.
Both Portal Tablet and Portal Core are needed to use the portal
body:
This mod require the main mod Qdc Quantum Dis-Assembly Craft to work.

Portal used to teleport to nearby biomes.

Both Portal Tablet and Portal Core are needed to use the portal

To open the gui use the Portal Tablet on the Portal Core

While in a biome Nature Particles are consumed, when out of particles, player will be teleported back to Portal Core.

The Portal Tablet can be used to return from a biome to the Portal Core used to teleport there.

https://qdc-mod.com/pages/biome_portal.html for recipes
